title: Role
text: Role This property determines how the button is activated: Normal (by clicking it; default), Default ( pressing Enter ), or Cancel (pressing Escape ). role = " Normal | Default | Cancel " Value Description Normal Button is activated when the user clicks it. Default Button is activated when the user presses Enter anywhere within the window border. The button is displayed with a thick border. Cancel Button is activated when the user presses Escape within the window border. Description When the button is activated, the field-level Detail trigger is fired. Use this trigger to define the action associated with the button. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(BTN5) = "role=default" Copy Applies To CommandButton Was this topic helpful?
